_doc: Oracle fixture for p1-authoritative-flag-actionable. The test (src-tauri/tests/forced_alignment.rs) synthesizes 16 kHz mono audio deterministically from `oracle_words`: for each word, `word_dur_sec` of a 300 Hz tone at amplitude 0.5, with `gap_sec` of silence separating consecutive words. The expected acoustic gap centers are the midpoints between `end_us` of word i and `start_us` of word i+1. The aligner (given only the segment span and the word texts) must place each interior boundary within ±30 ms of the corresponding gap center. Pass criteria: p95 boundary-vs-oracle error <= 30 ms.
_note_last_end: Synthesis ends at the last word's end (1800 ms). The final seg_end_us (1900000) pads 100 ms of silence at the tail so the aligner has an unambiguous right edge and word 4's end is not clipped to the word's acoustic end by a silent pad exactly zero frames wide.
